# reports/data/ — Auto-Generated Inventory Files

This directory contains structured JSON inventory files generated by `reports/scripts/generate_inventory.py`.

## How to Generate

```bash
python reports/scripts/generate_inventory.py
```

## Files

| File | Contents | Source |
|------|---------|--------|
| `room_identity.json` | Room name, space ID, capacity, asset counts | `room.config.yml` + `env/local.yml` + `instruction_library/activation/limits.yml` |
| `domain_capabilities.json` | All active example SQL with parameters and usage_guidance | `instructions/example_sql/*.yml` |
| `benchmark_inventory.json` | All benchmark test cases with status | `benchmarks/*.yml` |
| `snippet_inventory.json` | All active filters, measures, dimensions | `instructions/sql_snippets/**/*.yml` |
| `evaluation_history.json` | Evaluation session results | `build/eval_*.yml` |
| `sales_ready_questions.json` | Question catalog with trigger phrases | `instructions/example_sql/*.yml` (usage_guidance parsed) |
| `data_sources.json` | Full schema reference with column configs | `data_sources/tables.yml` + `metadata/columns/*.yml` |

## Rules

- **Never edit these files directly** — they are regenerated from the kit
- Regenerate after every push: `python reports/scripts/generate_inventory.py`
- Commit the generated files to version control to track capability history
